subcodes.first_line: O thou who gazest upon the Most Glorious Kingdom! The Ancient Beauty hath opened portals before the faces of His loved ones, and tokens of His bounty have [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ناظر بملکوت ابهی جمال قدم ابوابی بر وجوه احبابش گشوده و آثار موهبتی از
